hooks.command: [ "$(uname)" = "Darwin" ] && osascript -e "display alert \"Task Completed\" message \"Claude Code has finished its task.\"" || true
[ "$(uname)" = "Darwin" ] && osascript -e "display alert \"User Input Required\" message \"Claude Code needs your permission to proceed.\"" || true

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); branch=$(git -C "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir')" --no-optional-locks rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'no repo'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); echo "${branch}${remaining:+ | ${remaining}% ctx left}"
